code: # Dialling code -> the country/countries it belongs to (alias-set)
# signal ONLY. This is used to check whether a customer's phone jurisdiction *agrees* with a
# high-value billing/shipping address they already fired a wealth-geography signal on. It never
# originates a score (see docs/geography-signal-taxonomy.md — origin fields corroborate
# originate). Longest prefix wins (+1345 before +1). '#' lines ignored.
